verdict: Timeless delivers a potent 20% L-ascorbic acid formulation with synergistic ferulic and vitamin E, matching medical-grade efficacy at a fraction of luxury costs. The pH stability and antioxidant trio are exceptional, though packaging may compromise shelf-life.

_research.name: Vitamin C Serum 20% + Ferulic Acid
_research.con: Standard packaging may allow oxidation, reducing formula stability over time.
